notes: This artifact freezes the current looper CLI flag surface as part of the Go-port compatibility boundary.
Flag names, value shapes, forwarding behavior, and command-level meanings should remain compatible unless an intentional contract change is documented.
Only flags listed in configForwarding.globalFlags are forwarded by looper into daemon-start/config-loading flows via extractConfigArgs().

rules.description: looper forwards only the listed global flags into CLI config loading and daemon launch argument construction
other CLI flags, including --json and command-local flags, are not forwarded by extractConfigArgs()

globalFlags.name: json
globalFlags.semantics: Emit JSON output for commands that support JSON rendering.

globalFlags.name: config
globalFlags.semantics: Select the config file path used by looper and forwarded daemon-management flows.

globalFlags.name: host
globalFlags.semantics: Override the daemon host used for API client connection and forwarded daemon-management flows.

globalFlags.name: port
globalFlags.semantics: Override the daemon port used for API client connection and forwarded daemon-management flows.

globalFlags.name: db-path
globalFlags.semantics: Forward an explicit SQLite database path into daemon startup/config loading.

globalFlags.name: log-dir
globalFlags.semantics: Override the daemon log directory in CLI config loading and daemon-management flows.

globalFlags.name: daemon-mode
globalFlags.semantics: Override daemon.mode for CLI config loading and daemon-management flows.

globalFlags.name: git-path
globalFlags.semantics: Forward an explicit git binary path into daemon startup/config loading.

globalFlags.name: gh-path
globalFlags.semantics: Forward an explicit gh binary path into daemon startup/config loading.

globalFlags.name: osascript-path
globalFlags.semantics: Forward an explicit osascript binary path into daemon startup/config loading.

flagSemantics.repo-path: Repository path operand accepted either positionally or via flag.
flagSemantics.id: Explicit project id override for project creation.
flagSemantics.name: Explicit project display name for project creation.
flagSemantics.base-branch: Override the project base branch for project creation.
flagSemantics.worktree-root: Override the project worktree root for project creation.
flagSemantics.repo: Set the repository slug metadata for project creation.
flagSemantics.json: Emit the created project as JSON.

flagSemantics.force: Overwrite an existing installed managed daemon binary.

flagSemantics.lines: Request the last N log lines.
flagSemantics.json: Emit daemon log output metadata as JSON.

flagSemantics.check: Check for available CLI and daemon updates without installing.
flagSemantics.daemon: Install or upgrade the managed daemon binary.

flagSemantics.id: Loop identifier used by commands that target an existing loop.
flagSemantics.type: Loop type selector for starting a loop.
flagSemantics.pr: Pull request reference in owner/repo#number form when starting a reviewer loop.

flagSemantics.project: Project id that owns the created worker run.
flagSemantics.title: Human-readable task title.
flagSemantics.issue: Issue number used to seed the work request.
flagSemantics.spec: Path to a spec file used to seed the work request.
flagSemantics.repo: Repository slug associated with the work request.
flagSemantics.base-branch: Base branch override for the work request.
flagSemantics.json: Emit work creation results as JSON.

flagSemantics.project: Project id that owns the created planner run.
flagSemantics.issue: Issue number used to seed the planner run.
flagSemantics.json: Emit planner creation results as JSON.

flagSemantics.project: Project id used to resolve context for the review request.
flagSemantics.loop: Keep reviewing when new commits are pushed.
flagSemantics.json: Emit review creation results as JSON.

flagSemantics.type: Filter running loops by loop type.
flagSemantics.project: Filter running loops by project id.

flagSemantics.print-path: Print only the resolved worktree path.
flagSemantics.shell-integration: Print a shell helper function for the named shell.
flagSemantics.json: Emit jump resolution data as JSON.

flagSemantics.tail: Show the last N lines of output.
flagSemantics.full: Show the full output without truncation.
flagSemantics.json: Emit log payload metadata as JSON.
